summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Panel functionality for Barrister Salehi portfolio website completed successfully. All admin CRUD operations, authentication, and dynamic content loading work perfectly. Backend API tests: 14/14 passed.
passed_tests: Backend API: Admin login with valid credentials (admin/admin123)
Backend API: Admin login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend API: Admin authentication check works
Backend API: Public activities endpoint returns published activities
Backend API: Activity CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete) with auth
Backend API: Admin contacts endpoint with authentication
Frontend: Admin login page loads at /admin
Frontend: Invalid login shows proper Bengali error message
Frontend: Valid login redirects to /admin/dashboard
Frontend: Admin dashboard loads with activities and contacts tabs
Frontend: New post button opens activity creation form
Frontend: Activity creation form works (title, category, image_url, date, content, publish status)
Frontend: Activity creation successful (added test activities)
Frontend: Activity editing works (title successfully modified)
Frontend: Toggle publish/unpublish functionality works
Frontend: Contact messages tab displays received messages
Frontend: Logout button works and redirects to login
Frontend: Activities page fetches and displays activities from API (6 activities)
Frontend: Homepage activities section fetches from API (4 activities displayed)
Frontend: All public routes work (/, /biography, /vision, /activities, /contact)
Frontend: Navigation and footer present and functional
